summary: Verified P0 bug fix for NiftyOptionsBot telegram AttributeError. All 111 backend tests pass including the 3 new regression tests in test_bot_init_attributes.py. Bot construction succeeds; bot.telegram is a TelegramNotifier instance immediately after __init__ (enabled=False by default). _tl_rekey is a minimal 9-line guarded shim. Both call sites in main.py (lines 240 and 1650) use getattr(self, 'telegram', None) belt-and-suspenders guards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend-only verification. 111/111 pytest passing. main.py line 154 has self.telegram = TelegramNotifier() in __init__ tail. Guards at line 240 (startup) and 1650 (SMC notify).
rca of the issue: Original AttributeError happened because self.telegram assignment was misplaced outside __init__ (into _tl_rekey tail). Fix: restored assignment to __init__ tail, kept _tl_rekey as a minimal guarded shim, added getattr guards at call sites.
